标题:
Alexander Wang 25SS New Arrival! Luxury women's high heels, 1:1 original replica with textured, massaging insoles and injected logo. Features trendy round toe and high-elastic injected material—perfect for a queen! Extremely comfortable and stylish, with a sexy foot-revealing design. Unique letter logo, premium original leather. 

Upper: Ice silk mesh + imported rhinestones (gunmetal, white, apricot)  
Insole: Imported sheepskin  
Heel height: 10cm  
Sole: Original Italian imported dyed genuine leather outsole  
Sizes: 34-43 (sizes 34, 40, 41, 42, 43 are custom order, no returns)
